# Site images

Copy your pictures here (e.g. from your **Downloads** folder) and use these names:

| File name       | Used for                          |
|-----------------|------------------------------------|
| `btc-logo.png`  | Navbar and hero badge (BTC logo)   |
| `hero.jpg`      | Hero background (optional)         |
| `training.jpg`  | “About / BTC Training” section     |
| `teacher.jpg`   | Hero background and testimonials   |

Use PNG or JPG as needed; rename in code if you use different extensions.
